data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Product-only purchases', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for product-only purchases, yet there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate how such purchases are handled or validated. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the necessary validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of product-only purchases.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the handling of product-only purchases.
